text: There is an eerie quietness in this dimly lit, near-empty space. The angles and darkness make me feel slightly off-balance, as if the usual boundaries of a room have been unsettled. The glow of the exit sign and silent presence of R+D hint at innovation and knowledge, but right now it feels like I am in a moment suspended between activity and abandonment. I feel contemplative—and a little uneasy, as if I am lingering after hours in a place meant for minds at work.
